productDisplayName: Disney Kids Boy's Yellow Squirrel Kidswear
description: CompositionMustard yellow t-shirt in 100% cotton with Chip and Dale print on the frontWash care1. Machine wash in cold water with gentle cycle using mild detergent2. Wash dark colours seperately3. Do not bleach4. Do not soak or wring5. Dry inside-out6. Do not tumble dry7. Do not iron on print and studsFittingComfort FitIf naughty is what your young man is, there's no better way to highlight that cheeky characteristic of your little one than with this sunny yellow t-shirt with Chip and Dale prints on it. The two disney squirrels are always hatching plots to make mischief, as much as your little boy. Team this sunny T-shirt with denim shorts or three quarters for an enjoyable outing or a fun ride on the bicycle after school. Add on footwear from the crocs collection available at myntra, and make your handsome young man feel comfortable in style.
